stemHtml: Which one of the following would be classified as a fume event?

options.a: Unusual smell in the cabin in combination with eye irritation or fire extinguisher discharge in the cockpit.
options.b: Unusual smell in the cabin or detecting hydraulic fuel spots under the aircraft.
options.c: Smoking in the lavatory or unusual smell in the cabin.
options.d: Smoke from the galley or smoking in the lavatory.
